findings.description: The knowledge file renders the UserSearchForm class definition as `public class UserSearchForm {`, adding the `class` keyword. The source file omits `class`, showing `public UserSearchForm {`. While the source appears to contain a typo, the knowledge file modified the code beyond faithful extraction.
ValidatorUtil is a PascalCase class name used in the s3 implementation example (`ValidatorUtil.validate(form)`) but is absent from the s3 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `ValidatorUtil.validate(form)` in the クエリーパラメータ section implementation example

findings.description: UniversalDao is a PascalCase class name used in the s2 implementation example (`UniversalDao.findById(User.class, id)`) but is absent from the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `return UniversalDao.findById(User.class, id);` in the パスパラメータ section implementation example
